hooks.command: cwd=$(cat | jq -r '.cwd'); name=$(basename "$cwd"); if echo "$name" | grep -q '^dangeresque-'; then osascript -e "display notification \"$name needs attention\" with title \"dangeresque\""; fi
cwd=$(cat | jq -r '.cwd'); name=$(basename "$cwd"); if echo "$name" | grep -q '^dangeresque-'; then osascript -e "display notification \"$name complete\" with title \"dangeresque\""; fi
